text_raw: Here, maybe this one can help you.
text_clean: Here, maybe this one can help you.

text_raw: It won't be easy to track them up there.
text_clean: It won't be easy to track them up there.

text_raw: There's more to fear in the mountains than bandits.
text_clean: There's more to fear in the mountains than bandits.

text_raw: We have to be strong for him...
text_clean: We have to be strong for him...

text_raw: We need to find our boy, and quickly.
text_clean: We need to find our boy, and quickly.

text_raw: You must help us, we need him to survive.
text_clean: You must help us, we need him to survive.

text_raw: Please, help us find our boy!
text_clean: Please, help us find our boy!

text_raw: Those bastards will meet their makers.
text_clean: Those bastards will meet their makers.

text_raw: How could they take a child?
text_clean: How could they take a child?

text_raw: I'm certain they've taken him up into the mountains...
text_clean: I'm certain they've taken him up into the mountains...

text_raw: To offer him up as a sacrifice.
text_clean: To offer him up as a sacrifice.

text_raw: They say a child must be offered to appease the mountain spirit.
text_clean: They say a child must be offered to appease the mountain spirit.

text_raw: It was those ruffians, I'm sure of it! They took my baby!
text_clean: It was those ruffians, I'm sure of it! They took my baby!

text_raw: My sweet boy, he must be so frightened!
text_clean: My sweet boy, he must be so frightened!

text_raw: Do you know which way they went?
text_clean: Do you know which way they went?

text_raw: No matter. I'll search for him.
